name: Iso11783OPStoreVersion
title: Iso11783OPStoreVersion
syntax: long Iso11783OPStoreVersion( dword ecuHandle, char versionName[] );
description: The function stores the current object pool on the Virtual Terminal. A Store Version command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
